rationale: For Portugal, the unresolved US-Iran deal remains the main indirect factor through potential energy price relief; no other headlines have meaningful impact on daily life.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported near; Lebanon strikes ongoing
top_events.summary: A concluded deal could lower European gas and oil prices, benefiting Portuguese consumers and the tourism-dependent economy, but deal remains unconfirmed.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US restricts Anthropic AI for non-US users; minor impact on Portuguese businesses and researchers using these tools.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Swiss vote on capping population at 10 million is a distant political signal; minimal direct impact on Portugal.
